text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This outfit just screams, "super lucky final form"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah!
choice_data_list:
Looks like your normal signature racewear to
me.

Looks like your normal signature racewear to
me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't say that. I went out of my way to put
this on. Would it hurt to act a little more
impressed?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, it is in need of a few more finishing
touches.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's lacking in spiritual power! An outfit with no
luck is nothing but a vessel.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means we need to imbue this thing with
spiritual power! First up, we're visiting the most
sacred site in the whole academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the very end of the corridor, there is a sign
that reads "Student Council Office."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This room is a mystical spot only a chosen few
may enter!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Right at the very back of this office lies a certain
sacred treasure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, a piece of paper blessed with divinity that
grants power beyond your wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Should you read the holy verse before a race...
motivation will overflow within you. It'll be
coming out of your ears!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right... The coast is clear, right? Doesn't look
like anyone's around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm just gonna take a quick peek...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey, you don't have to put it like that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's call it... a silent pilgrimage! A ritual that
evades the gaze of the gods!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Not buying it, huh? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I beg of thee! Avert your eyes from my
actions, please?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful to hear you say that! Our hearts
move as one! My crimes are your crimes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Found it! This is it! The school motto that
encapsulates what every Umamusume should
strive to be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The framed parchment on the wall reads, "Eclipse
first, the rest nowhere."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that's a saying for the books... Before we
depart, let us fill ourselves with its spiritual
power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having received guidance from the teachings of
Tracen Academy, Matikanefukukitaru seems
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've got what we came for, let's make
our retreat—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey. You've got some nerve trespassing here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: V-Vice Prez Narita Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's not what you think! This was just a
spur-of-the-moment kind of thing. I didn't mean
anything bad by it, so I don't suppose you could
look the other way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You're busted no matter where I look.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Gyaaah! You'd judge me without even looking?!
You're brutal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian reprimands her harshly. Nonetheless,
Matikanefukukitaru succeeds in powering up her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
When did you become such a party pooper?!
Well, I'm not giving up that ea—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ack, stop pulling me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, we get permission from Vice President Air
Groove to enter the student council office.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is it! The school motto that encapsulates
what every Umamusume should strive to be!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The sacred parchment, the giver of
unprecedented power! Hey, that sounded kind of
cool.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
"Eclipse first, the rest nowhere." Gosh, I'm getting
chills!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's an eclipse? Does it go in your hair?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Unbelievable... Are you saying the meaning of this teaching evades you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Allow me to set your heart and mind straight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No need, thanks! Even if I don't have a clue what
it means, the vibes are enough!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Not so fast. Stay right where you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru gets lectured by Air Groove
for a good while, but it seems like she learns quite
a bit.
